name: PhilateLister stamp catalog
author: Exergy ∞ LLC
description: Entity shard: stamp set, series, or definitive issue grouping.

entities.name: issue_series
entities.brief: Named set or series an issue belongs to.
entities.description: Groups stamps into sets, definitive series, commemoratives, or specialized series for browsing and pricing context.

fields.name: series_id
fields.description: Stable unique id for this series within the catalog.

fields.name: country_id
fields.description: Primary issuing country or administration for this series.

fields.name: name
fields.description: Display name of the set or series (e.g. 1875 bicolors, Europa 1980).

fields.name: description
fields.description: Scope, catalog cross-references, or how stamps are grouped in this series.

fields.name: year_from
fields.description: First year of issue represented in this series, if applicable.

fields.name: year_to
fields.description: Last year of issue for multi-year series; omit for single-year or ongoing.

fields.name: parent_series_id
fields.description: Optional parent series for nested grouping (e.g. country definitives under a broad program).
